_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to coordinate, collaborate and disseminate information to subordinate, lateral and higher-level organizations.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to identify and develop data and AI leadership talent within the organization, recognizing potential across diverse backgrounds and building leadership pipelines that strengthen organizational capability.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-A-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-003 (LS, cosine: 0.564), LS-A-005 (LS, cosine: 0.553).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.8/10 (raw 0.379). Shared vocabulary: [ability]. DCWF-only terms [collaborate, coordinate, disseminate, higher, information, lateral] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, ai, backgrounds, building, capability, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.866 (P=0.869, R=0.862). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 26-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.7%). "Ability to coordinate, collaborate and disseminate information to subordinate, l" and "Ability to identify and develop data and AI leadership talent within the organiz" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.598 > STS 0.379 (gap +0.219). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ability] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.4%. Shared tokens: [ability]. DCWF-only: [collaborate, coordinate, disseminate, higher, information, lateral]. WIDAI-only: [across, ai, backgrounds, building, capability, data].

signals.detail: STS 0.379 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.

Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.219 with low STS 0.379. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
